title: Orbital Dripstone Cannon
description: A orbital strike cannon themed cannon but with dripstone.
body:
**ORBITAL DRIPSTONE CANNON | 1.21.x |**

This mod/plugin makes the orbital strike cannon but with a twist the tnt is dripstone.

### Features

/orbital [rod/payload] [dripstone]

### Installation Guide

1. You need a papermc server 1.21.x
2. Take the jar you get from downloading it and out it into the plugins folder
3. And the plugin will work like that

I got this idea for making it from seeing that the orbital strike cannon by wemmbu is very popular then i decided to make it.

**I hope i get support guys thank you!**
